title: Campaign Monitor vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Sendinblue: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Sendinblue: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Sendinblue comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Sendinblue targets transactional email and SMS campaigns. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Sendinblue?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Sendinblue is stronger for transactional email and SMS campaigns. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point ($11/mo vs $25/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Sendinblue to Campaign Monitor is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
